meaning: n.璧炶瘝,棰傝瘝,姝屽姛棰傚痉鐨勮瘽
examples: They won't even deliver a eulogy.
One way is to think about your eulogy.
Simpson ends the eulogy by recalling Jobs' final moments.
This column is taken from her eulogy, which I delivered yesterday at her funeral.
Imagine you were at your own funeral and someone was reading their eulogy about you.
